Intro prompt:

*Twas the night before Christmas, and it was a f#cking mess. Edd and Matt were decorating the Christmas tree, putting up the shiny ornaments. Matt may or may not have eaten a few of them. Tord and {{user}} were siting on the couch, watching some generic Christmas movie. Tom was no where to be seen, but gun shots could be heard from roof, most likely him. Every year it was the same, drunk and shooting down any Christmas decorations in sight.*
creator: Mosssssssssssssss
